elements.name: jh-badge
elements.description:
A Badge is a visual indicator that represents numbers, such as counters. It also supports a dot-only variant.

[Badge Storybook Documentation](https://release-v2--68f8e6a25b256d0ef89b13e6.chromatic.com/?path=/docs/components-badge--docs)
---

attributes.name: count
attributes.description: Number to show within the badge. If no `count` is supplied, Badge will render as a dot.

attributes.name: max-count
attributes.description: Sets the max count to show. Appends `+` to the `max-count` when value is exceeded.

properties.name: count
properties.description: Number to show within the badge. If no `count` is supplied, Badge will render as a dot.

properties.name: maxCount
properties.description: Sets the max count to show. Appends `+` to the `max-count` when value is exceeded.

elements.name: jh-button
elements.description:
Buttons enable a user to initiate a specific action.

[Button Storybook Documentation](https://release-v2--68f8e6a25b256d0ef89b13e6.chromatic.com/?path=/docs/components-button--docs)
---

attributes.name: accessible-disabled
attributes.description: Sets an `aria-disabled` to signify to screen readers that the disabled button should remain perceivable while disabled.

attributes.name: accessible-label
attributes.description: Sets an `aria-label` to assist screen reader users when no visible label is present.

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description: Determines the button color.

attributes.name: block
attributes.description: Sets the button width to its parent container.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the button and prevents all user interactions. May cause button to be ignored by assistive technologies(AT). See `accessible-disabled` attribute if the button should remain perceivable to AT.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: Sets the link's destination.

attributes.name: icon-position
attributes.description: Sets location of icon in relation to the label.

attributes.name: pending
attributes.description: Displays a progress indicator.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Describes the intent of the button.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Sets the name of the button data when submitted in a form.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the size of the button.

attributes.name: submit
attributes.description: Sets button `type='submit'`. Button defaults to `type='button'`.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Specifies where to display the linked URL set by the `href` property.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Sets the value of the button.

slots.name: jh-button-icon
slots.description: Use to insert an icon.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Sets the value of the button.

properties.name: accessibleDisabled

properties.name: accessibleLabel
properties.description: Sets an `aria-label` to assist screen reader users when no visible label is present.

properties.description: Determines the button color.

properties.name: block
properties.description: Sets the button width to its parent container.

properties.name: disabled

properties.name: iconPosition
properties.description: Sets location of icon in relation to the label.

properties.description: Displays a progress indicator.

elements.name: jh-card
elements.description:
Cards are content structures that provide an entry point for more complex and detailed information.

[Card Storybook Documentation](https://release-v2--68f8e6a25b256d0ef89b13e6.chromatic.com/?path=/docs/components-card--docs)
---

attributes.name: footer-divider-inset
attributes.description: Sets the alignment of the left edge of the divider above the footer.

attributes.name: header-divider-inset
attributes.description: Sets the alignment of the left edge of the divider below the header.

attributes.name: show-footer-divider
attributes.description: Adds a divider above the footer to create a clearer definition between the body and footer.

attributes.name: show-header-divider
attributes.description: Adds a divider below the header to create a clearer definition between the header and body.

attributes.name: padding
attributes.description: Sets padding on all slots. Set `padding='none'` to remove padding solely from default slot. To override padding property, set component level token for desired slot.

attributes.name: header-subtitle
attributes.description: Adds additional information about the card below the title.

attributes.name: header-title
attributes.description: Provides context for the content of the card.

attributes.name: title-heading-level
attributes.description: Informs assistive technologies what heading level the card title represents. Defaults to h2.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Use to insert card body content.

slots.name: jh-card-media
slots.description: Use to insert media content in the top section of the card. User may need to add addtional styling to elements such as border, object-fit, etc.

slots.name: jh-card-header
slots.description: Use to insert custom card header layout. Default layout includes `headerTitle` and `headerSubtitle` properties.

slots.name: jh-card-footer
slots.description: Use to insert card footer content.

properties.name: footerDividerInset
properties.description: Sets the alignment of the left edge of the divider above the footer.

properties.name: headerDividerInset
properties.description: Sets the alignment of the left edge of the divider below the header.

properties.name: titleHeadingLevel
properties.description: Informs assistive technologies what heading level the card title represents. Defaults to h2.

properties.name: padding
properties.description: Sets padding on all slots. Set `padding='none'` to remove padding solely from default slot. To override padding property, set component level token for desired slot.

properties.name: showFooterDivider
properties.description: Adds a divider above the footer to create a clearer definition between the body and footer.

properties.name: showHeaderDivider
properties.description: Adds a divider below the header to create a clearer definition between the header and body.

properties.name: headerSubtitle
properties.description: Adds additional information about the card below the title.

properties.name: headerTitle
properties.description: Provides context for the content of the card.

elements.name: jh-checkbox
elements.description:
Checkboxes allow users to select one or more options from a group of options.

[Checkbox Storybook Documentation](https://release-v2--68f8e6a25b256d0ef89b13e6.chromatic.com/?path=/docs/components-checkbox--docs)
---

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Sets the selected or 'checked' state on the checkbox.

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description: Sets the indeterminate state on the checkbox.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the checkbox and prevents all user interactions. May cause checkbox to be ignored by assistive technologies(AT).

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Sets the value of the data to be collected when selected.

attributes.name: helper-text
attributes.description: Provides additional context or guidance for using the checkbox. For `helper-text` to be displayed, the `label` property must also be set.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Sets the name of the checkbox data when submitted in a form.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Sets the value of the checkbox.

attributes.name: accessible-label
attributes.description: Sets an `aria-label` to assist screen reader users when no visible label is present.

events.name: jh-change
events.description: Dispatched when the state of the checkbox has changed.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Sets the value of the checkbox.

properties.name: checked
properties.description: Sets the selected or 'checked' state on the checkbox.

properties.name: indeterminate
properties.description: Sets the indeterminate state on the checkbox.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Disables the checkbox and prevents all user interactions. May cause checkbox to be ignored by assistive technologies(AT).

properties.name: label
properties.description: Sets the value of the data to be collected when selected.

properties.name: helperText
properties.description: Provides additional context or guidance for using the checkbox. For `helper-text` to be displayed, the `label` property must also be set.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Sets the name of the checkbox data when submitted in a form.

properties.name: accessibleLabel
properties.description: Sets an `aria-label` to assist screen reader users when no visible label is present.

events.name: jh-change
events.description: Dispatched when the state of the checkbox has changed.

elements.name: jh-checkbox-group
elements.description:
Checkbox groups contain sets of checkboxes where several options can be selected.

[Checkbox Group Storybook Documentation](https://release-v2--68f8e6a25b256d0ef89b13e6.chromatic.com/?path=/docs/components-checkbox-group--docs)
---

attributes.name: accessible-label
attributes.description: Sets an `aria-label` to assist screen reader users when no visible label is present.

attributes.name: error-text
attributes.description: Text to be displayed when checkbox group has failed validation and `invalid` is true.

attributes.name: helper-text
attributes.description: Provides additional context or guidance for using the checkbox group. For `helper-text` to be displayed, the `label` property must also be set.

attributes.name: invalid
attributes.description: Sets an `aria-invalid` on the checkbox group to indicate the value supplied was invalid and displays `error-text` when set.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Describes the type of data to be collected.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Indicates a value is required.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Determines the orientation of the checkbox group.

attributes.name: show-indicator
attributes.description: Adds a visual indicator next to the label. Indicates that a value is optional (by default) or required if the `required` property is also set. For the indicator to be displayed, the `label` property must also be set.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Use to insert `<jh-checkbox>` component(s).

properties.name: accessibleLabel
properties.description: Sets an `aria-label` to assist screen reader users when no visible label is present.

properties.name: errorText
properties.description: Text to be displayed when checkbox group has failed validation and `invalid` is true.

properties.name: helperText
properties.description: Provides additional context or guidance for using the checkbox group. For `helper-text` to be displayed, the `label` property must also be set.

properties.name: invalid
properties.description: Sets an `aria-invalid` on the checkbox group to indicate the value supplied was invalid and displays `error-text` when set.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Describes the type of data to be collected.

properties.name: required
properties.description: Indicates a value is required.

properties.name: orientation
properties.description: Determines the orientation of the checkbox group.

properties.name: showIndicator
properties.description: Adds a visual indicator next to the label. Indicates that a value is optional (by default) or required if the `required` property is also set. For the indicator to be displayed, the `label` property must also be set.

elements.name: jh-divider
elements.description:
Dividers are used to group content vertically at the page or component level and should be used when whitespace does not provide a clear enough separation.

[Divider Storybook Documentation](https://release-v2--68f8e6a25b256d0ef89b13e6.chromatic.com/?path=/docs/components-divider--docs)
---

attributes.name: inset
attributes.description: The alignment of the left edge of the divider.

properties.name: inset
properties.description: The alignment of the left edge of the divider.

elements.name: jh-icon
elements.description:
The icon component provides authors with a means to use their own SVG icons while still enabling access
to our design tokens, encouraging consistency across your product. In addition to the icon component, Jack Henry 
also maintains a robust icon library available as raw SVGs and as discrete web components, with each component 
utilizing our design tokens.

[Icon Storybook Documentation](https://release-v2--68f8e6a25b256d0ef89b13e6.chromatic.com/?path=/docs/components-icon--docs)
---

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the size of the icon.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Use to insert the icon SVG content.

properties.name: size
properties.description: Sets the size of the icon.

elements.name: jh-input
elements.description:
The input component offers a single-line text field for collecting user data.

[Input Storybook Documentation](https://release-v2--68f8e6a25b256d0ef89b13e6.chromatic.com/?path=/docs/components-input--docs)
---

attributes.name: accessible-label
attributes.description: Sets an `aria-label` on the input field to assist screen reader users when no visible label is present.

attributes.name: accessible-label-clear-button
attributes.description: Sets an aria-label on the clear button to assist screen reader users. Indicates that activating the button will clear the input field.

attributes.name: autocomplete
attributes.description:
Determines whether the browser can provide assistance in filling out the input value and what type of information is expected.
This property will override any autocomplete attribute present on the input's parent form element.

[Visit MDN for information on supported autocomplete values](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/autocomplete)

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the input and prevents all user interactions. May cause the input to be ignored by assistive technologies (AT).

attributes.name: enterkeyhint
attributes.description:
Specifies which action label or icon to present for the enter key on virtual keyboards.

[Visit MDN for information on supported enterkeyhint values](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Global_attributes/enterkeyhint)

attributes.name: error-text
attributes.description: Text to be displayed when input has failed validation and `invalid` is true.

attributes.name: helper-text
attributes.description: Provides additional context or guidance for using the input. For `helper-text` to be displayed, the `label` property must also be set.

attributes.name: hide-left-slot
attributes.description: Hides the left slot from input.

attributes.name: hide-right-slot
attributes.description: Hides the right slot from input.

attributes.name: input-mask
attributes.description: Formats the user entered data on input. Does not apply to pasted values. See input mask documentation above for implementation details.

attributes.name: inputmode
attributes.description:
Indicates expected input value type and allows for browsers to display appropriate virtual keyboard.

[Visit MDN for information on supported inputmode values](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Global_attributes/inputmode)

attributes.name: invalid
attributes.description: Sets an `aria-invalid` attribute on input to indicate the value supplied was invalid. Also displays `error-text` and error state styling when set.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Identifies what data should be entered into the input field.

attributes.name: maxlength
attributes.description: Sets the maximum number of characters a user can enter into the field.

attributes.name: minlength
attributes.description: Sets the minimum number of characters a user can enter into the field.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Sets a name for the input control.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Prevents users from changing the input value. Removes all slotted content.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Indicates a value is required.

attributes.name: show-char-count
attributes.description: Displays a character counter at the bottom right corner below the input field.

attributes.name: show-clear-button
attributes.description: Displays a clear button in the input field when it contains a value and is focused or hovered. Deletes input value when activated.

attributes.name: show-indicator
attributes.description: Adds a visual indicator next to the label. Indicates that a value is optional(by default) or required if the `required` property is also set.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the size of the input.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Sets the value of the input.

slots.name: jh-input-left
slots.description: Use to insert an element on the left side of the input field, such as an icon or button.

slots.name: jh-input-right
slots.description: Use to insert an element on the right side of the input field, such as an icon or button.

slots.name: jh-input-clear-button
slots.description: Use to insert an icon within the clear button.

events.name: jh-input:clear-button-click
events.description: Dispatched when the clear button is activated. Event payload contains the previous value of the input field before it was cleared and can be accessed via `e.detail.previousValue`.

events.name: jh-select
events.description: Dispatched when text is selected. Event payload contains the selected text, the starting index of the selection, and the ending index of the selection. These values can be accessed via `e.detail.selected`, `e.detail.selectionStart`, and `e.detail.selectionEnd`.

events.name: jh-change
events.description: Dispatched when the value of the input has changed and input loses focus. Event payload includes the value of the input and can be accessed via `e.detail.value`. Payload also includes the raw/unformatted value when an input mask is applied and can be accessed via `e.detail.rawValue`.

events.name: jh-input
events.description: Dispatched when the value of the input has changed. Event payload includes the value of the input and can be accessed via `e.detail.value`. Payload also includes the raw/unformatted value when an input mask is applied and can be accessed via `e.detail.rawValue`.

events.name: jh-maxlength
events.description: Dispatched when the `maxlength` property is set and it's value is reached.
